/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/X:JOHN ZAHAR ACCEPTS APPOINTMENT AS COUNSEL OF RECORD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/987,2/ACM/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND ISORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD ANDBY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:300 BLOCK OF TURK ST,, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
